name: Cheque Bounce
query:
SELECT
    per.reference_name AS "Sales Invoice ID:Link/Sales Invoice:180",

    pe.name AS "Payment ID:Link/Payment Entry:180",

    pe.posting_date AS "Posting Date:Date:120",

    c.customer_name AS "Dealer Name:Data:220",

    pe.custom_sales_person AS "Sales Person Name:Link/Sales Person:200",

    pe.mode_of_payment AS "Mode Of Payment:Link/Mode of Payment:180",

    pe.reference_no AS "Cheque No.:Data:150",

    pe.reference_date AS "Cheque Date:Date:150",

    pe.paid_amount AS "Amount:Currency:150"

FROM
    `tabPayment Entry` pe

LEFT JOIN
    `tabCustomer` c
ON
    c.name = pe.party

LEFT JOIN
    `tabPayment Entry Reference` per
ON
    per.parent = pe.name

WHERE
    pe.docstatus = 1
    AND pe.custom_check_bounce = 1
    AND per.reference_doctype = 'Sales Invoice'

ORDER BY
    pe.posting_date DESC
